message:
bd-ml2r.8.1: add Phase-1 rollout gate tests and go/no-go decision evidence

Evidence-backed validation for Phase-1 FNX enablement:
- Default policy verified (Advisory mode with undirected projection)
- Canary state machine progression tests
- Rollback trigger validation on error threshold
- Traffic sampling determinism verification
- Evidence serialization and bundle aggregation
- Go/no-go checklist with structured JSON output

All 9 gate tests pass, confirming Phase-1 readiness.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
